LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STEVEN GIANFERMO'S MOTION TO DESIGNATE DOE DEFENDANT AND AMEND COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST, SERVICE WAS INSUFFICIENT PURSUANT TO CCP 1005, WHICH REQUIRES AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS FOR NOTICE OF HEARING. FURTHER, IN MAKING A MOTION TO AMEND A COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 473, THE MOVING PARTY MUST ATTACH A COPY OF THE PROPOSED PLEADING AND FOLLOW THE REQUIREMENTS OF CRC 3.1324. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Appearances: ATTY MANDISSA LOGAN, ROUDA FEDER TIETJEN McGUINN, 415.398.5398. APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO APPEARANCE BY ANY OTHER PARTY OR COUNSEL.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STEVEN GIANFERMO'S Motion To Designate Doe Defendant Trio Display & Fixture Company, Inc.'s And Amend The Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185.

Mtn To Designate Doe Deft And Amend Complt
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STEVEN GIANFERMO'S Motion To Designate Doe Defendant And Amend Complaint is off calendar. First, service was insufficient pursuant to CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing. Further, in making a motion to amend a complaint pursuant to CCP 473, the moving party must attach a copy of the proposed pleading and follow the requirements of CRC 3.1324. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
